birthdayMessage:
It's your birthday today!! Happy Birthday to the greatest pookie of all time, the one and only Miss Bilahi!! ✨

I wish you all the happiness in the world, and I pray that you live the happiest and longest life. You mean the world to me, and your happiness is my happiness.

Now what are you waiting for? Go celebrate your special day, my lil honeybun, pookiebun, bilahibun! You deserve all the love, joy, and happiness today and always. 💖

I lob you lots and lotssss. Muaahhhhhhh.😘

From yours and only yours,
Alooguti
secretEndingMessage: Amazing! You found all 5 secret birthday boxes! You are a master veggie explorer!
